description:
Merge the capture files '/home/ga/Documents/captures/dns.cap' and '/home/ga/Documents/captures/http.cap' into a chronologically sorted file named '/home/ga/Documents/captures/merged_traffic.pcapng'. Create a summary report at '/home/ga/Documents/captures/merge_report.txt' with the following exact format:

Total Packets: <number>
Protocols: <comma-separated list of major protocols>
First Packet: <date time>
Last Packet: <date time>

The protocol list must include at least 'DNS' and 'HTTP'.
